meaning: n.[宗](基督教)圣堂武士,法学生,法律家
examples: Lars was looking for the treasure of the Knights Templar.
I would say that today at the Round Tower you came face-to-face with a brother of the Knights Templar.
My nicely leveled-up Templar is in his second playthrough of the first two Acts of Path of Exile.
In the fifteenth century, the Medici family of bankers and merchants rose in Templar-like fashion, amassing vast wealth and influence.
